DARK_ORB.description: Orb: When [gold]Evoked[/gold], deals damage to the enemy with the least HP. Increases damage every turn.
DARK_ORB.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, increase this Orb's damage by [blue]{Passive}[/blue].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to the enemy with the lowest HP.
DARK_ORB.title: Dark
EMPTY_SLOT.description: Orbs can be channeled into these slots.
EMPTY_SLOT.title: Orb Slot
FROST_ORB.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Gain [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
FROST_ORB.title: Frost
GLASS_ORB.description: Orb: Deals damage to ALL enemies. Decreases damage every turn.
GLASS_ORB.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies and reduce this orb's value by [blue]1[/blue].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
GLASS_ORB.title: Glass
LIGHTNING_ORB.description: Orb: Deals damage to random enemies.
LIGHTNING_ORB.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
LIGHTNING_ORB.title: Lightning
PLASMA_ORB.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the start of turn,
gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
Plasma is unaffected by [gold]Focus[/gold].
PLASMA_ORB.title: Plasma
